Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The AppendVector method appends a vector field to the state buffer layout.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void AppendVector(const Marshal::In<std::string>& fieldName, DataType type, size_t elementCount, size_t arraySize = 0);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The name to assign to the vector field in the state buffer layout.
The scalar data type of each vector component.
The number of scalar components in the vector.
The optional array element count. Use 0 for a non-array field.
